response.justification: Candidate has exceptional technical depth in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and build systems—exactly what the role needs technically. However, the resume shows no clear evidence of people management, team leadership, or strategic planning at scale. This is explicitly a mid-to-senior full-time management role requiring 2+ years leading people, which is not demonstrated here. The candidate appears to be on a senior/staff individual-contributor track rather than the management track.
strengths: Deep expertise in developer tools, testing frameworks, CI/CD infrastructure, and build systems—directly aligned with the role's focus areas
15+ years of polyglot software development demonstrating broad technical leadership capability and ability to choose the right tool for each problem
Strong track record of knowledge sharing through workshops, mentoring culture (Refactoring Dojos), open-source libraries, and technical speaking
concerns: No demonstrated people management experience—resume shows no team leadership, direct reports, hiring, or performance management responsibilities despite job requiring 2+ years of this
Limited evidence of strategic roadmap planning, organizational change leadership, or cross-team collaboration—the core responsibilities of a manager
Mobile platform knowledge gap—most experience is backend, infrastructure, and web; job emphasizes 'major mobile platform ecosystem' and prefers mobile knowledge

key_factors.factor: Technical expertise in developer tools & build systems
